I am inviting the community to review the last 7 pages of the 'NumPy Contributor Comics', which is part of the GSOD-NumPy 2024 project. If this looks familiar, that’s because this work is a continuation of the GSOD 2023 work. The comic can be viewed here, as a PDF (to upload link). You can [comment directly on the PDF viewer](https://drive.google.com/file/d/18-CWOIoBjMrffwMuKsx2YRkY9hkJm-dM/view?usp=drive_link) or on this Github issue. These comics aim to show newcomers that NumPy is driven by people who use it: in this case, scientists! These comics will show grad students finding a usability problem in NumPy, working together to submit an issue, and talking to community members. This thread will be open for the next two weeks. **For Review:** - For review, you can comment on any part, such as re-wording a specific line or panel. - I recommend jumping to review pages 11-16 and the back cover, since that was completed this year. **Some major changes since last review:** - Remove from references of PyData NYC 2023 edition - This part was added when I gave a talk about the grant at PyData NYC - Add other characters, such as the contributor and maintainer - Show the process of reviewing PRs, merging and release cycle - Add a credit section to name original contributors that made the .npz filetype change","reactions":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/numpy/numpy/issues/27375/reactions","total_count":0,"+1":0,"-1":0,"laugh":0,"hooray":0,"confused":0,"heart":0,"rocket":0,"eyes":0},"timeline_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/numpy/numpy/issues/27375/timeline","performed_via_github_app":null,"state_reason":null},"comment":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/numpy/numpy/issues/comments/2397682711","html_url":"https://github.com/numpy/numpy/issues/27375#issuecomment-2397682711","issue_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/numpy/numpy/issues/27375","id":2397682711,"node_id":"IC_kwDOAA3dP86O6bwX","user":{"login":"Joao-antonio-gg","id":81188505,"node_id":"MDQ6VXNlcjgxMTg4NTA1","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/81188505?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/Joao-antonio-gg","html_url":"https://github.com/Joao-antonio-gg","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Joao-antonio-gg/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Joao-antonio-gg/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Joao-antonio-gg/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Joao-antonio-gg/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Joao-antonio-gg/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Joao-antonio-gg/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Joao-antonio-gg/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Joao-antonio-gg/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Joao-antonio-gg/received_events","type":"User","site_admin":false},"created_at":"2024-10-07T19:09:26Z","updated_at":"2024-10-07T19:09:26Z","author_association":"NONE","body":"Hello! I'm from Brazil, and I really enjoy your comic. I'd love to help translate it into Portuguese. Would it be possible for me to translate your work and send it to you or help share it with others?","reactions":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/numpy/numpy/issues/comments/2397682711/reactions","total_count":0,"+1":0,"-1":0,"laugh":0,"hooray":0,"confused":0,"heart":0,"rocket":0,"eyes":0},"performed_via_github_app":null}}

I am inviting the community to review the last 7 pages of the 'NumPy Contributor Comics', which is part of the GSOD-NumPy 2024 project. If this looks familiar, that’s because this work is a continuation of the GSOD 2023 work. The comic can be viewed here, as a PDF (to upload link). You can [comment directly on the PDF viewer](https://drive.google.com/file/d/18-CWOIoBjMrffwMuKsx2YRkY9hkJm-dM/view?usp=drive_link) or on this Github issue. These comics aim to show newcomers that NumPy is driven by people who use it: in this case, scientists! These comics will show grad students finding a usability problem in NumPy, working together to submit an issue, and talking to community members. This thread will be open for the next two weeks. **For Review:** - For review, you can comment on any part, such as re-wording a specific line or panel. - I recommend jumping to review pages 11-16 and the back cover, since that was completed this year. - Is there a clear Call to Action for people interested in learning more about contributing to NumPy? - Is the difference between the role of a maintainer and contributor clear? **Some major changes since last review:** - Remove from references of PyData NYC 2023 edition - This part was added when I gave a talk about the grant at PyData NYC - Add other characters, such as the contributor and maintainer - Show the process of reviewing PRs, merging and release cycle - Add a credit section to name original contributors that made the .npz filetype change","reactions":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/numpy/numpy/issues/27375/reactions","total_count":0,"+1":0,"-1":0,"laugh":0,"hooray":0,"confused":0,"heart":0,"rocket":0,"eyes":0},"timeline_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/numpy/numpy/issues/27375/timeline","performed_via_github_app":null,"state_reason":null},"comment":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/numpy/numpy/issues/comments/2400632170","html_url":"https://github.com/numpy/numpy/issues/27375#issuecomment-2400632170","issue_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/numpy/numpy/issues/27375","id":2400632170,"node_id":"IC_kwDOAA3dP86PFr1q","user":{"login":"Joao-antonio-gg","id":81188505,"node_id":"MDQ6VXNlcjgxMTg4NTA1","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/81188505?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/Joao-antonio-gg","html_url":"https://github.com/Joao-antonio-gg","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Joao-antonio-gg/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Joao-antonio-gg/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Joao-antonio-gg/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Joao-antonio-gg/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Joao-antonio-gg/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Joao-antonio-gg/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Joao-antonio-gg/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Joao-antonio-gg/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Joao-antonio-gg/received_events","type":"User","site_admin":false},"created_at":"2024-10-08T19:17:09Z","updated_at":"2024-10-08T19:17:09Z","author_association":"NONE","body":"Hi! I really like the idea of creating an issue to track the translation, and you can count on me to follow all the guidelines for the process. As for the font, the one you mentioned, Anime Ace, has almost all the letters needed for Portuguese, except for the cedilla (ç). If necessary, we can discuss finding a new font that better suits the language, ensuring all the letters and accents are properly covered.","reactions":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/numpy/numpy/issues/comments/2400632170/reactions","total_count":0,"+1":0,"-1":0,"laugh":0,"hooray":0,"confused":0,"heart":0,"rocket":0,"eyes":0},"performed_via_github_app":null}}

comic","user":{"login":"MarsBarLee","id":46167686,"node_id":"MDQ6VXNlcjQ2MTY3Njg2","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/46167686?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/MarsBarLee","html_url":"https://github.com/MarsBarLee","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/MarsBarLee/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/MarsBarLee/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/MarsBarLee/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/MarsBarLee/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/MarsBarLee/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/MarsBarLee/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/MarsBarLee/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/MarsBarLee/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/MarsBarLee/received_events","type":"User","user_view_type":"public","site_admin":false},"labels":[{"id":1624869342,"node_id":"MDU6TGFiZWwxNjI0ODY5MzQy","url":"https://api.github.com/repos/numpy/numpy.org/labels/translations","name":"translations","color":"207de5","default":false,"description":""}],"state":"open","locked":false,"assignee":null,"assignees":[],"milestone":null,"comments":1,"created_at":"2024-10-14T00:54:58Z","updated_at":"2024-10-28T17:44:28Z","closed_at":null,"author_association":"CONTRIBUTOR","active_lock_reason":null,"body":"Hi all, this is a tracking isuse on translating the "How to Contribute to Numpy" comic. These comics aim to show newcomers that NumPy is driven by people who use it: in this case, scientists! These comics will show grad students finding a usability problem in NumPy, working together to submit an issue, and talking to community members. Here's [a link to the comic](https://heyzine.com/flip-book/3e66a13901.html). This is following similar efforts to translate the NumPy documentation at #55 ## Timeline I will be able to help with translation after December, since I am finishing up the comic before then. ## Languages - We'll probably start with a Portuguese translation. - @joao-antonio-gg expressed interest in translating the comics to Portuguese in a [previous issue about the comics](https://github.com/numpy/numpy/issues/27375) - I welcome other languages as well! Just comment here with your interest and language. ## Process - Translate the [English script](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1bXwHd8F-0zFMeCu9ohASynmyOY03cmZHNTOD2Sp2oC0/edit?usp=sharing) into the target language (note: this is not the final script but close to final) - Review the translation - Update the text in a graphics editor (such as GIMP, Inkscape or Krita) - Review the typesetting (does the translated text fit in the speech bubbles?) - Release translated comic **Items:** - Comic script in English - Comic pages with blank speech bubbles - Comic script in target language - Comic pages with target language","reactions":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/numpy/numpy.org/issues/789/reactions","total_count":0,"+1":0,"-1":0,"laugh":0,"hooray":0,"confused":0,"heart":0,"rocket":0,"eyes":0},"timeline_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/numpy/numpy.org/issues/789/timeline","performed_via_github_app":null,"state_reason":null},"comment":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/numpy/numpy.org/issues/comments/2442237126","html_url":"https://github.com/numpy/numpy.org/issues/789#issuecomment-2442237126","issue_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/numpy/numpy.org/issues/789","id":2442237126,"node_id":"IC_kwDOAA6rk86RkZTG","user":{"login":"Joao-antonio-gg","id":81188505,"node_id":"MDQ6VXNlcjgxMTg4NTA1","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/81188505?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/Joao-antonio-gg","html_url":"https://github.com/Joao-antonio-gg","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Joao-antonio-gg/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Joao-antonio-gg/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Joao-antonio-gg/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Joao-antonio-gg/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Joao-antonio-gg/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Joao-antonio-gg/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Joao-antonio-gg/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Joao-antonio-gg/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Joao-antonio-gg/received_events","type":"User","user_view_type":"public","site_admin":false},"created_at":"2024-10-28T17:44:26Z","updated_at":"2024-10-28T17:44:26Z","author_association":"NONE","body":"Hello!
